---
title: "🫵 Welcome"
---

# 🦶 Life Of Python 🐍 

🐍  In search of the Holy Grail 🏆 of programming, I have discovered Python.

🐍  It's not the Meaning of Life, but is better than a dead Parrot. 🦜

✍️ After following a few messiahs of my own, I got better, so I spam 
the world's cyrcus with these lessons.
